title: Aircraft
author: David, Evan John, 1877-1961

quoteFirst: 3.17 P. M.—From Admiral Plunkett, commander of destroyer force at Plymouth: “NC-4 arrived at Plymouth 13.24 (
quoteLast: New York time) in perfect condition. Joint mission of seaplane division and destroyer force accomplished. Regret loss of NC-1 and damage to NC-3; nevertheless, information of utmost value gained thereby. Has department any further instructions?”
title: Aircraft
author: David, Evan John, 1877-1961
